headline: Is It Time To Reassess PepsiCo (PEP) Shares After Recent 3 Year Performance Slump
summary: Wondering if PepsiCo at around US$157 a share still offers value, or if most of the upside is already reflected in the price. The stock has a recent 7 day return of 2.6%, a 30 day return of 2.3% decline, and a year to date return of 10.4%, with a 1 year return of 11.4% and a 5 year return of 28.6%. These moves sit against a longer 3 year return of 5.8% decline, which offers a different picture to the shorter term performance. That split between recent momentum and the 3 year record is why...

headline: Apple at 50: The iPhone maker 'blew a 5-year lead' on AI, but former insiders say it can still win
summary: In dominating consumer devices, Apple sold users on the promise of privacy. To compete in AI, it may have to pivot.
